data.title: Intellia Announces Proposed Public Offering of Common Stock
data.description: Intellia Therapeutics, Inc., based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, revealed on April 27, 2026, their launch of an underwritten public offering totaling $150 million in shares of common stock. The company, known for its focus on transforming medicine through CRISPR gene editing and other cutting-edge technologies, plans to authorize the underwriters a 30-day option to buy an extra fifteen percent (15%) of the common stock shares offered in the public offering. All shares in the proposed offering will be sold by Intellia.

data.title: Asure Software Launches AsureWorks, a Done-for-You Payroll and HR Service for Employers
data.description: On April 27, 2026, Asure Software, Inc. (Nasdaq: ASUR) from Austin, Texas, introduced a new service called AsureWorks. This service provides payroll and HR solutions for employers and includes handling day-to-day HR administration. AsureWorks is a done-for-you service where Asure specialists manage payroll and HR tasks on behalf of clients. It is available alongside AsureCentral, Asure’s payroll and HR software platform driven by Luna AI. This gives employers the option to choose between handling tasks themselves using AsureCentral or having Asure’s team take care of it through AsureWorks. Under both models, clients retain their status as the employer of record.

data.title: Erasca Announces Positive Preliminary Phase 1 Dose Escalation Data for Potentially Best-in-Class Pan-RAS Molecular Glue ERAS-0015 in KRAS-Mutant Solid Tumors
data.description: Strong effectiveness seen in treating KRAS G12X non-small cell lung cancer with monotherapy. The overall response rate was 62% in second-line treatment or later, and 75% in those treated after immunotherapy or platinum in the second or third-line, with a daily dose range of 16-32 mg PAD. Additionally, a 64% overall response rate was observed in the second-line or later patients receiving a daily dose of 24-32 mg RDE.

data.title: CVS Health Wins Gold in Enterprise AI, and Silver in Customer Experience AI at 2026 Stevie® (American Business Awards®) for Enterprise Scale AI Innovation
data.description: A prestigious award has been bestowed upon CVS Health® for its exceptional AI technology in healthcare operations and customer service. The company, headquartered in Woonsocket, R.I., achieved the remarkable feat on April 27, 2026. CVS Health® was honored with a Gold award for Enterprise AI and a Silver award for Customer Experience AI. The recognition underscores CVS Health®'s leading position in utilizing advanced AI solutions within the industry. The company, listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol CVS, continues to set the standard in AI-driven innovations for enhancing healthcare services and customer satisfaction.

data.title: VaynerX Launches Tamara Group: The Attention, Media, And Relevance Agency
data.description: The most recent company under VaynerX, Tamara Group, is a tribute to Gary Vaynerchuk's mother, Tamara Vaynerchuk. Recently, in New York on April 27, 2026, VaynerX revealed the establishment of Tamara Group - The Attention, Media, And Relevance Agency. This new agency began with important clients such as Ulta.

data.title: New Zelle® Survey Data: Boomers Built Main Street. Now They're Ready to Sell - But Gen Z and Millennials Aren't Buying.
data.description: Recent survey results have shed light on the reasons behind the lack of buyers for local American small businesses and suggested that updating their operations could be the key to capturing the interest of the next generation of entrepreneurs. The survey, conducted in New York on April 27, 2026, highlighted a significant number of small business owners who are planning to retire, commonly known as the "Silver Wave". The data indicates that a growing number of these businesses are struggling to attract potential buyers, prompting experts to emphasize the importance of modernizing their practices to appeal to younger generations.

data.title: Fed study: ChatGPT's launch linked to 50% drop in U.S. programmer job growth. 1st proof AI hurts hiring in tech.
data.description: According to a recent study by the Federal Reserve, the release of ChatGPT led to a significant decrease in the growth of programmer jobs in the United States, with numbers showing a sharp halving. This study provides the first concrete evidence at an institutional level of the impact of AI implementation on the hiring of developers.

data.title: GameStop Bets On Retro: Inside The Strategy Behind The Nationwide In-Store Rollout
data.description: GameStop Corp. is embracing the retro gaming trend by introducing dedicated retro sections in all U.S. stores by early May. This move comes as the company aims to tap into the global retro console market, which is expected to increase from $3 billion in 2025 to $8 billion by 2033. In an interview with Benzinga, GameStop revealed insights into how they source inventory, the comparison of margins with new releases, and why a brick-and-mortar retro aisle can compete with online giants like Amazon and eBay. The company emphasized that the retro section involves curation, rather than just stocking random trade-ins. This strategic shift has led to an increase in GameStop's stock price. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: 88 individuals, including minors, charged in France for violent crypto wrench attacks; 75 in pretrial detention.
data.description: 88 individuals in France, including minors, have been charged by authorities in connection with violent crypto wrench attacks. Of those, 75 suspects are currently held in pretrial detention while investigations are ongoing.

data.title: DeepMind, with MSIT, collaborates to establish an AI Campus in S. Korea for scientific advancements, AI safety, and talent growth.
data.description: Korea's Ministry of Science and ICT (MSIT) has joined forces with DeepMind to establish an AI Campus that will prioritize scientific advancements, AI safety, and the nurturing of skilled individuals. This collaboration aims to drive innovation and research in the field of artificial intelligence and create a hub for talent development. The initiative is set to leverage cutting-edge technologies to propel breakthroughs in AI.

data.title: Colgate-Palmolive Announces Webcast of its 2026 First Quarter Earnings Conference Call May 1, 2026 - Now at 8:00 a.m. ET and its 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders on May 8, 2026 at 10:00 a.m. ET
data.description: Colgate-Palmolive Company (NYSE: CL) has rescheduled its 2026 first quarter earnings conference call to Friday, May 1, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. ET, moving it earlier from its original timing of 8:30 a.m. ET. The live webcast will feature key executives including Chairman, President, and CEO Noel Wallace, CFO Stan Sutula, Investor Relations EVP Claire Ross, and M&A and Special Projects EVP John Faucher. Investors can access the webcast to stay updated on the company's financial performance.

data.title: VisionSys AI Inc. Announces Proposed $90 Million Strategic Investment at $1.50 Per Share
data.description: VisionSys AI Inc. (NASDAQ: VSA) disclosed today that it is in advanced talks with a strategic investor for a proposed investment deal. As per the current terms being negotiated, the investor intends to inject a sum of $90 million into VSA at $1.50 per share.

data.title: BitMine secures 101k ETH as it faces $6.5B in unrealized losses. Despite price volatility, it keeps buying and staking to grow its treasury.
data.description: The cryptocurrency treasury firm is persisting in purchasing Ether while earning staking rewards, despite experiencing substantial price fluctuations that have resulted in billions in unrealized losses on its financial statement.
